languages.text: Рабочий скрючился на полу — на его изломанном плече впечатавшийся след механической руки. Кто-то с огромной силой схватил его и швырнул об стену.
The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.
languages.original_text: Рабочий скрючился на полу — на его изломанном плече впечатавшийся след механической руки. Кто-то с огромной силой схватил его и швырнул об стену.

traits.locale_text: The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.
The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.
The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.

languages.text: 労働者は床に倒れ、肩は機械の腕の跡で粉々に砕かれている。誰かが彼を強く掴んで壁に投げつけたのだ。
languages.original_text: The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.

traits.locale_text: 労働者は床に倒れ、肩は機械の腕の跡で粉々に砕かれている。誰かが彼を強く掴んで壁に投げつけたのだ。

languages.text: 工人蜷缩在地板上，他碎裂的肩头有一个机械手的印记。有人用极大的力气抓住了他，把他扔到了墙上。
languages.original_text: The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.

traits.locale_text: 工人蜷缩在地板上，他碎裂的肩头有一个机械手的印记。有人用极大的力气抓住了他，把他扔到了墙上。

languages.text: L'ouvrier recroquevillé au sol porte la marque d'une main mécanique sur son épaule brisée. Quelqu'un l'a saisi avec une grande force avant de le projeter contre le mur.
languages.original_text: The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.

traits.locale_text: L'ouvrier recroquevillé au sol porte la marque d'une main mécanique sur son épaule brisée. Quelqu'un l'a saisi avec une grande force avant de le projeter contre le mur.

languages.text: El trabajador está acurrucado en el suelo con la señal de una mano mecánica en su hombro destrozado. Alguien lo ha levantado con una fuerza inmensa y lo ha arrojado contra la pared.
languages.original_text: The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.

traits.locale_text: El trabajador está acurrucado en el suelo con la señal de una mano mecánica en su hombro destrozado. Alguien lo ha levantado con una fuerza inmensa y lo ha arrojado contra la pared.

languages.text: İşçi yere büzülmüş, parçalanmış omzunda mekanik bir elin izi duruyor. Biri onu büyük bir güçle yakalayıp duvara fırlatmış.
languages.original_text: The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.

traits.locale_text: İşçi yere büzülmüş, parçalanmış omzunda mekanik bir elin izi duruyor. Biri onu büyük bir güçle yakalayıp duvara fırlatmış.

languages.text: Der Arbeiter kauert auf dem Boden. Auf seiner gebrochenen Schulter ist der Abdruck einer mechanischen Hand zu sehen. Jemand hat ihn mit enormer Kraft gepackt und an die Wand geschleudert.
languages.original_text: The worker is huddled on the floor, the imprint of a mechanical hand on his shattered shoulder. Someone seized him with great force and threw him against the wall.

traits.locale_text: Der Arbeiter kauert auf dem Boden. Auf seiner gebrochenen Schulter ist der Abdruck einer mechanischen Hand zu sehen. Jemand hat ihn mit enormer Kraft gepackt und an die Wand geschleudert.
